title: Playback on Web at SoundCloud

We are considering open sourcing it, and this blog post is a technical overview of what we’ve achieved thus far with Maestro.

title: SocialFolders Releases SoundCloud Ruby Gem
summary: There are many approaches to building libraries that wrap HTTP APIs. This approach has a few benefits. It guarantees a certain consistency and is relatively easy to maintain.…

title: SoundCloud Strategy for OmniAuth 1.0
summary: OmniAuth is a great little Rack library that standardizes multi-provider authentication for web applications. As OmniAuth says, “it was created to be powerful, flexible, and do as little as possible.” I use it constantly on hacks that mash up multiple API providers. You can now add SoundCloud to the growing list of strategies OmniAuth 1.0 supports.
